title: Shared frontend scaffolding (api helper, IST/number format utils, types)

files_forbidden: any file under src/ outside src/frontend/

acceptance_criteria: api.ts exports a typed GET helper that accepts a path + AbortSignal, parses JSON, and surfaces network/HTTP errors as a typed result (no throw-on-404 swallow); it must NOT assume a bare array — it handles the running server's `{ data: T[] }` and `{ data: [], message }` envelope shapes.

format.ts exports: nullable string->number coercion (null/undefined/'' -> null, NaN rejected), a currency/P&L formatter that shows sign and 2 decimals, and IST helpers built on Intl.DateTimeFormat({ timeZone: 'Asia/Kolkata' }) for (a) formatting a timestamp as an IST date-time string and (b) computing the IST 'today' YYYY-MM-DD boundary.

types/trading.ts exports a PaperTrade interface matching the running /api/trades row (snake_case, NUMERIC fields typed as string|null), the {data,message} envelope type, and a TickMessage union for the running /ws/ticks shapes ({type:'connected',timestamp} | {type:'tick',symbol,ltp,timestamp}).
All exports are NAMED exports (no default exports). TypeScript strict passes (bun run typecheck).

Vitest unit tests in format.test.ts cover: null/empty/NaN coercion, P&L sign formatting (+/-/0), IST date formatting is timezone-stable regardless of host TZ, and IST 'today' boundary correctness around midnight.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
